tasks.subject: Task 1: Matrix value-sets + pure notification-prefs helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Value-sets in lib/enums.ts + pure lib/notification-prefs.ts (DEFAULT_PREFS, parsePrefs, isEnabled, isValidCell, applyPatch), TDD.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit notification-prefs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/enums.ts", "lib/notification-prefs.ts", "tests/unit/notification-prefs.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit notification-prefs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["value-sets exported", "DEFAULT_PREFS preserves behavior", "parsePrefs merges/strips/never-throws", "isEnabled/isValidCell/applyPatch correct", "unit-tested"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Schema — add notificationPrefs JSON + backfill (keep booleans)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add User.notificationPrefs Json? + backfill migration from the two booleans (kept for now). Prisma 7.8 supports Json on SQLite.

**Verify:** npx tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma", "prisma/migrations"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["notificationPrefs Json? added, booleans kept", "migration adds col + backfills real JSON booleans", "prisma generate ok", "tsc clean"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Per-type dispatch filtering in notifyParticipants
tasks.description:
**Goal:** notifyParticipants consults per-type prefs — in-app row only if inApp enabled; email only if EMAILABLE && email enabled. Update notifications.test.ts (opt-out via prefs + in-app-mute case).

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit notifications.test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/notifications.ts", "tests/unit/notifications.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit notifications.test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["query selects notificationPrefs", "in-app gated by inApp pref", "email gated by EMAILABLE + email pref", "tests updated: opt-out via prefs + in-app-mute case"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Per-type desktop notification firing (client)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** shouldFireOsNotification per-type via desktopPrefs+type; NotificationProvider prop desktopPrefs; layout builds desktopPrefs from parsePrefs. Update notification-client.test.ts.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit notification-client && npx tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/notification-client.ts", "components/NotificationProvider.tsx", "app/app/layout.tsx", "tests/unit/notification-client.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit notification-client && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["shouldFireOsNotification per-type", "provider prop desktopPrefs + passes type", "layout builds desktopPrefs from parsePrefs", "client test updated"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Settings API — per-cell PATCH
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PATCH body {type,channel,enabled} validated (400 on invalid/unknown/non-boolean/resolve+email); applyPatch(parsePrefs) → persist → return {ok,prefs}. Rewrite settings.notifications.test.ts.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit settings.notifications

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/settings/notifications/route.ts", "tests/unit/settings.notifications.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit settings.notifications", "acceptanceCriteria": ["per-cell body validated", "400 on invalid/unknown/non-boolean/resolve+email", "persists via applyPatch + returns prefs", "test rewritten"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Settings matrix UI + e2e rewrite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** NotificationSettings matrix (rows=types, cols=channels; resolve+email disabled cell); per-cell optimistic PATCH + desktop permission gate; pref-<type>-<channel> testids. Page passes parsePrefs. Rewrite notifications-pref.spec.ts.

**Verify:** npx tsc --noEmit && pnpm lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/NotificationSettings.tsx", "app/app/settings/notifications/page.tsx", "tests/e2e/notifications-pref.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit && pnpm lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["matrix with resolve+email disabled cell", "per-cell optimistic PATCH + desktop permission gate", "pref-<type>-<channel> testids + SMTP copy", "page parsePrefs + e2e rewritten"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Drop legacy boolean columns + full verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drop emailNotifications/desktopNotifications (nothing references them now) + prove the phase green end-to-end.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit && pnpm lint && npx tsc --noEmit && pnpm build && (free 3000; pnpm test:e2e); grep legacy booleans → empty.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma", "prisma/migrations"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit && pnpm lint && npx tsc --noEmit && pnpm build && (lsof -ti tcp:3000 | xargs -r kill -9; pnpm test:e2e)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no refs to legacy booleans", "columns dropped via migration + client regenerated", "unit+e2e+lint+tsc+build all green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
